title: nageia cupressina
intro: Nageia cupressina, also known as the 'Cypress-pine', is a species of coniferous tree native to Borneo and the Philippines. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Nageia cupressina include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the Nageia cupressina tree are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
